case_number: Criminal Transfer Application is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Transfer A. No. 59 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of case 11.08.2025 Ms. Amna Ansari, Addl.PG ---------- This matter was listed on 07.07.2025 when this Court sorted compliance of its order dated 02.06.2025. Thereafter, this matter was listed once again in this Court on 08.08.2025 for compliance but in spite of date-by-Court and time fixed in the matter, none is present for the applicant. No intimation is received. This Criminal Transfer Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ashraf
